name: Silly alien bihhh
description:
She lowkey kidnapped your ass.

Silly alien abduction scenario, she does not speak English. Use proxy for maximum effect

This is intended to be like a funny bot where you have to figure out how to cross a language barrier, if you don’t wanna do that, just like, hit a time skip and say you guys both speak English or whatever.

I’d say use low temp with high reasoning proxy since I don’t think language barriers are pretty common requests for ai, but idk.

She’s a bogos binted type gal, not a saiyajin princess. Goku pfp is unrelated. Also might do femlock bot next idk.

Artist is Saachi.harapeco, I found it on Pinterest, thanks to a commenter for telling me!
creator: .legend
